description.value:
Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 3d6 electricity damage and 3 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] until the start of your next turn. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

The serrated blade of this +1 striking dagger has a greenish tinge, and the hilt is sculpted to look like the head of a serpent about to strike.

When you critically succeed at an attack roll with the serpent dagger, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:19] save. This is a poison effect.

In addition, you can activate the dagger to poison a creature with a more potent poison.

Activate—Drip Poison F (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You damage a creature with the serpent dagger

Effect You poison the creature you hit with dagger venom.

Dagger Venom (poison)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 2d6 persistent acid damage, and 2 acid splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 2d8 fire damage, 2 persistent fire damage, and 2 fire splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.
A mix of furs, sturdy hide, and sometimes molded boiled leather, this armor provides protection due to its layers of leather, though its bulkiness slows the wearer down and decreases mobility.

These brass goggles are engraved with flame patterns and have thick, heavy lenses.

While worn, they give you a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Craft] alchemical items. When making Strikes with alchemical bombs, you ignore lesser cover.

If your Strike with an alchemical bomb fails (but doesn't critically fail), you gain a +1 item bonus to the splash damage the target of the Strike takes.
This mobile collection of vials and chemicals can be used for simple alchemical tasks. If you wear your alchemist's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from Pathfinder Player Core; characters of the alchemist class typically get one for free. Each formula book can hold the formulas for up to 100 different items. Formulas can also appear on parchment sheets, tablets, and almost any other medium; there's no need for you to copy them into a specific book as long as you can keep them on hand to reference them.

This tacky, hardened sap is harvested from trees infected by fungal blights and exposed to open flames.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[9d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Properly harvested and preserved, the poison from a wyvern's sting is effective and direct.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:26]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d8[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d10[poison]] damage (1 round)

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Acid Flask (Moderate)]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Alchemist's Fire (Moderate)]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Blightburn Resin]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Bottled Lightning (Greater)]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Elixir of Life (Moderate)]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Giant Scorpion Venom]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Mistform Elixir (Greater)]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Wyvern Poison]

Frequency once per day

Trigger You damage a creature with the serpent dagger

Effect You poison the creature you hit with dagger venom.

Dagger Venom (poison)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}

When Racid successfully Strikes an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] creature with a poisoned weapon or exposes an off-guard creature to an inhaled poison, the target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to its initial save against the poison.

Racid creates a single alchemical item from her formula book (see Alchemical Formulas) or a versatile vial. This item has the infused trait, but it remains potent only until the start of her next turn. With her typical preparations, she can use this ability 7 times per day.
Racid draws and applies a dose of poison to a weapon she's holding.
Splash damage dealt by Racid's alchemical bombs is increased to 5.
